details.question: How many annual leave days do full-time staff get?
details.answer: Full-time staff at the Singapore HQ receive 18 days of paid annual leave per calendar year [1]. Full-time staff at the Kuala Lumpur office receive 16 days of annual leave [2]. Full-time staff at the Bengaluru office receive 21 days of annual leave [2]. Full-time staff at the Jakarta office receive 12 days of annual leave [2].

details.question: If a public holiday falls on my annual leave day, is that leave day deducted?
details.answer: If a public holiday falls on a day that an employee has already been approved for annual leave, that annual leave day is not deducted from their entitlement. The public holiday takes precedence and the annual leave day is restored [1].

details.question: How many days of sick leave are employees entitled to?
details.answer: Employees are entitled to 14 days of paid sick leave per year at the Singapore HQ and Kuala Lumpur office. Bengaluru office employees are entitled to 12 days of sick leave. Sick leave entitlement for the Jakarta office is not specified. [1][2]

details.question: What is the maximum number of annual leave days that can be carried forward?
details.answer: Unused annual leave may be carried forward up to a maximum of 5 days into the next calendar year [1].

details.question: Can I use annual leave during my probation period?
details.answer: No, annual leave can only be used after completing the 3-month probation period [1][2][3]. Annual leave accrues from the start date but may only be used after probation ends [1][3].

details.question: What are the standard working hours at MaiStorage?
details.answer: Standard working hours are Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, with a 1-hour lunch break. This totals 40 hours per week [1].

citations.text:

### Standard Hours

Standard working hours are Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, with a 1-hour lunch break. This totals 40 hours per week.

details.question: If I work on a public holiday, what compensation do I get and can I also keep my leave day if I had leave approved?
details.answer: Employees required to work on a public holiday will receive either a replacement day off or payment at 1.5x their daily rate, at the manager's discretion [1]. If a public holiday falls on a day that an employee has already been approved for annual leave, that annual leave day is not deducted from their entitlement [1].

details.question: How do I submit an expense reimbursement and what is the deadline?
details.answer: To submit an expense reimbursement, receipts must be submitted through the Finance portal. The deadline for submission is within 30 days of the expense. Late submissions may not be reimbursed [1].

details.answer: Employees rated 4 or above are eligible for promotion consideration [1].

details.question: What does error code ERR-5023 indicate?
details.answer: Error code ERR-5023 indicates that the storage quota has been exceeded. The account has reached its provisioned capacity; upgrade the plan or free space is required [1].
